description: User examines the heatmap for the 'Opportunities to schedule' screen.
frame_description: The screen shows a heatmap overlay on a mobile app mockup titled 'Opportunities to schedule'.

description: User clicks on the 'Profile' screen thumbnail to update the heatmap view.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the third thumbnail at the bottom of the heatmap view.

description: The heatmap view updates to show the 'Profile' screen data.
frame_description: The mobile mockup now displays the 'Profile' screen with its corresponding heatmap.

description: User examines the heatmap for the 'Profile' screen.
frame_description: The user pauses to look at the heatmap data for the Profile section.

description: User clicks the 'Recordings' tab to switch from the heatmap view.
frame_description: The UI switches from the 'Heat map' tab to the 'Recordings' tab, showing a list of participant videos.
